---
title: "Économétrie Financière - Master 2 UPEC"
subtitle: "Applications avec `R`"
author: "-"
date: "Hiver 2026"
output:
  html_document:
  toc: true
toc_float: true
code_folding: show
theme: flatly
highlight: tango
df_print: paged
geometry: margin=2.5cm
fontsize: 11pt
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center",
  fig.width = 10,
  fig.height = 6,
  cache = TRUE
)
```

```{r package, eval=TRUE}
# install.packages(c("quantmod", "tidyverse", "PerformanceAnalytics",
# "rugarch", "forecast", "tseries", "ggplot2"))

# Chargement des packages
library(quantmod)
library(tidyverse)
library(PerformanceAnalytics)
library(rugarch)
library(forecast)
library(tseries)
library(ggplot2)
```
